evidence.source_title: Neural network dose prediction for cervical brachytherapy: Overcoming data scarcity for applicator-specific models.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 38814165. 2024/07/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: 3D neural network dose predictions are useful for automating 
brachytherapy (BT) treatment planning for cervical cancer. Cervical BT can be 
delivered with numerous applicators, which necessitates developing models that 
generalize to multiple applicator types. The variability and scarcity of data 
for any given applicator type poses challenges for deep learning.
PURPOSE: The goal of this work was to compare three methods of neural network
